summary: Game Tile Live Not Entitled Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND a Live game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a not entitled Live game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> at <home_team>, Live, Not Entitled. Press select to play game. Press up for the main menu. Move down to browse more content."
